articles.title: Canada’s teen social media ban comes with a Big Tech off-ramp - Politico
articles.description: Ottawa’s long-awaited digital safety bill targets under-16s, but it gives tech companies a path back if they clean up their platforms.
articles.content: Under the proposed law, social media companies would be required to block users under 16 from creating accounts, with steep penalties for those that fail to comply. Companies could seek an exemption … [+2751 chars]
